title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 483.225 - Office, where kept
text:
483.225.  Office, where kept. — Notwithstanding any other provisions of law or provisions of supreme court rules, the clerk of the supreme court shall keep his office in the supreme court building at Jefferson City and other personnel which the supreme court is authorized to appoint pursuant to section 477.005 may keep their offices in the supreme court building.
(RSMo 1939 § 13272, A.L. 1978 H.B. 1634) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 11653; 1919 § 2099; 1909 § 2664 
Effective 1-02-79
